sentences.target: Der Nebel hängt über dem Fluss.

translations.de: Der Nebel hängt über dem Fluss.
translations.en: The fog hangs over the river.
translations.es: La niebla se extiende sobre el río.
translations.fr: La brume flotte au-dessus de la rivière.
translations.it: La nebbia si stende sul fiume.
translations.pt: A neblina paira sobre o rio.
translations.vi: Sương mù lơ lửng trên dòng sông.
translations.nl: De mist hangt boven de rivier.
translations.hu: A köd a folyó felett lebeg.
translations.hi: धुंध नदी के ऊपर छाई है.
translations.el: Η ομίχλη απλώνεται πάνω από το ποτάμι.
translations.ja: 川の上に霧がかかっている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article in nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject noun 'Nebel'.
Nominative singular masculine noun; grammatical subject of 'hängt'.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; intransitive, with a locative PP indicating position.
Preposition selecting the dative for static location; head of the PP 'über dem Fluss'.
Definite article in dative masculine singular; determiner of 'Fluss' within the PP.
Dative singular masculine noun; object of the preposition 'über'.

sentences.target: Heute liegt dichter Nebel über der Stadt.
sentences.reading: /ˈhɔʏtə liːkt ˈdɪçtɐ ˈneːbl̩ ˈyːbɐ deːɐ̯ ʃtat/

translations.de: Heute liegt dichter Nebel über der Stadt.
translations.ipa: /ˈhɔʏtə liːkt ˈdɪçtɐ ˈneːbl̩ ˈyːbɐ deːɐ̯ ʃtat/
translations.en: Today thick fog lies over the city.
translations.es: Hoy una niebla espesa cubre la ciudad.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui un épais brouillard recouvre la ville.
translations.it: Oggi una fitta nebbia avvolge la città.
translations.ko: 오늘 도시는 짙은 안개에 덮여 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天浓雾笼罩着这座城市。
translations.pt: Hoje uma neblina densa cobre a cidade.
translations.he: היום ערפל כבד מכסה את העיר.
translations.vi: Hôm nay sương mù dày đặc bao phủ thành phố.
translations.nl: Vandaag hangt er dichte mist over de stad.
translations.hu: Ma sűrű köd borítja a várost.
translations.hi: आज शहर पर घना कोहरा छाया हुआ है.
translations.pl: Dziś nad miastem zalega gęsta mgła.
translations.el: Σήμερα πυκνή ομίχλη σκεπάζει την πόλη.
translations.nb: I dag ligger tett tåke over byen.
translations.id: Hari ini kabut tebal menyelimuti kota.
translations.sv: Idag ligger tät dimma över staden.
translations.ro: Astăzi o ceață densă acoperă orașul.
translations.cs: Dnes leží nad městem hustá mlha.
translations.da: I dag ligger tæt tåge over byen.
translations.ja: 今日は濃い霧が街を包んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb in clause-initial position; modifies the predicate 'liegt'.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; stative verb describing location, complemented by a PP.
Attributive adjective, nominative masculine singular with strong inflection; modifies 'Nebel'.
Nominative singular masculine noun; grammatical subject of 'liegt'.
Preposition selecting the dative in a static context; introduces the PP 'über der Stadt'.
Definite article in dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Stadt' in the PP.
Dative singular feminine noun; object of the preposition 'über'.

sentences.target: Im Nebel sehe ich kaum den Weg.
sentences.reading: /ɪm ˈneːbl̩ ˈzeːə ɪç kaʊm deːn veːk/

translations.de: Im Nebel sehe ich kaum den Weg.
translations.ipa: /ɪm ˈneːbl̩ ˈzeːə ɪç kaʊm deːn veːk/
translations.en: In the fog I can barely see the path.
translations.es: Con la niebla apenas veo el camino.
translations.fr: Dans la brume, je distingue à peine le chemin.
translations.it: Nella nebbia vedo a malapena il sentiero.
translations.ko: 안개 속에서 길이 거의 안 보여.
translations.zh-Hans: 在雾中我几乎看不见路。
translations.yue: 喺霧入面我幾乎睇唔到條路。
translations.ru: В тумане я едва вижу дорогу.
translations.pt: Com a neblina mal consigo ver o caminho.
translations.he: בערפל אני בקושי רואה את השביל.
translations.tr: Sisli havada yolu zar zor görebiliyorum.
translations.vi: Trong sương mù tôi hầu như không nhìn thấy lối đi.
translations.nl: In de mist zie ik het pad amper.
translations.uk: У тумані я ледве бачу стежку.
translations.hu: A ködben alig látom az ösvényt.
translations.hi: धुंध में मुझे रास्ता मुश्किल से दिखाई देता है.
translations.el: Στην ομίχλη μετά βίας βλέπω το μονοπάτι.
translations.nb: I tåka ser jeg knapt stien.
translations.id: Di dalam kabut aku nyaris tidak melihat jalan.
translations.sv: I dimman ser jag knappt stigen.
translations.da: I tågen kan jeg knap nok se stien.
translations.ja: 霧の中では道がほとんど見えない。

tokens.explanation: Contracted form of 'in dem' (ADP+DET); introduces a locative PP with dative.
Dative singular masculine (mass noun); complement of 'Im' in the PP.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present indicative.
Personal pronoun, nominative 1st person singular; subject of 'sehe'.
Adverb of degree/negation-like polarity; modifies the verb phrase, indicating low extent.
Definite article in accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Weg'.
Accusative singular masculine noun; direct object of 'sehe'.

translations.fr: Ils conduisent lentement dans le brouillard.
translations.yue: 有霧嘅時候佢哋會慢慢開車。
translations.vi: Khi có sương mù họ lái xe chậm.
translations.hi: धुंध में वे धीरे गाड़ी चलाते हैं.
translations.ja: 霧の中では彼らはゆっくり運転する。
